**Corrections made:**

1. **Removed "one person is someone"** — tautological and violates the closed lexicon (bare content word "person" without a proper head structure).

3. **Simplified to core semantic payload:** someone (frame-implicit agent) makes things happen for many people; there exists a time; at that time, many people do what the agent wants; the agent is above (has authority over) the people.
4. **Kept groundingRefs empty** — the note uses only ALLOWED words and primes; no catalog references needed.

The record now passes the gate: lowercase, NFC, all tokens in the closed lexicon, no self-reference, no undeclared molecules.
